name: Standardize malformed-Inngest-payload disposition
description: Some Inngest functions use strict `.parse(event.data)` instead of `.safeParse()`, meaning a malformed payload throws a ZodError that Inngest treats as a transient failure, retries 5+ times, and permanently clogs the queue. Three confirmed sites: filing-timed-out-observe.ts:40, graduation-narration.ts:17, supportership-revocation.ts:18. WI-985/996 addressed specific earlier sites; this WI standardizes the disposition pattern for the remaining three.
acceptanceCriteria: Current state: three Inngest functions use throwing .parse(): (1) apps/api/src/inngest/functions/filing-timed-out-observe.ts:40 `filingTimedOutEventSchema.parse(event.data)`; (2) graduation-narration.ts:17 `personGraduatedEventSchema.parse(event.data)`; (3) supportership-revocation.ts:18 `supportershipUnlinkedEventSchema.parse(event.data)`. Canonical pattern established by ask-silent-classify.ts:44-50 and auto-file-session.ts:54-68: use `.safeParse(event.data)`, on failure log + captureException + return early (permanently bad payloads must not be retried). Target: replace `.parse(event.data)` with `.safeParse()` at all three sites and add the standard fail-fast disposition: log structured error, captureException, return `{ status: 'invalid_payload', error: parsed.error.message }` — matching the ask-classification-observe.ts:37-52 pattern. Complements WI-985 (Ready — Inngest payload Zod parse) which likely covers a different subset of sites; this WI is the sweep of the three confirmed remaining sites. Grep to confirm no new `.parse(event.data)` regressions: `grep -rn '\.parse(event\.data' apps/api/src/inngest/functions --include='*.ts' | grep -v safeParse | grep -v test`. Verification: typecheck passes; add a test for each converted function asserting that a call with a malformed event.data returns the invalid_payload status without throwing.
riskImpact: Reliability: a bad payload permanently retries 5+ times, burning Inngest quota and potentially delaying legitimate runs queued behind it.
